selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next strong adjacent active sibling after the first entropy-control reduction.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active A1 entropy support family into a smaller controller-usable fence set without rereading raw A1 support sources or promoting support doctrine into lower-loop law.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next active sibling once the entropy support layer is narrowed.
Strongest work-surface follow-on if the queue returns to export archaeology next.
Strongest later work-surface packet once the active A1 entropy sequence pauses.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the entrypoint split, support-term role classifications, failed-fix residue, probe witness fence, and stalled rescue/decomposition seam needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: PROBE_COMPANIONS_ARE_WITNESS_ONLY_AND_NO_LANE_WIDENING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's cleanest witness-only gate without allowing substrate drift.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the stalled rescue target, lower-loop decomposition block, and no-basin-movement result in one bounded controller packet.

quarantined_items.name: SUPPORT_SURVIVAL_OR_WITNESS_COVERAGE_AS_DIRECT_EXECUTABLE_PROMOTION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent repeatedly preserves head, passenger, and witness distinctions and forbids widening from probe support.

quarantined_items.name: SUPPORT_PACK_ACCUMULATION_OR_FAILED_FIX_DOCUMENTATION_AS_NEW_ONTOLOGY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly treats this family as support doctrine and retained failure evidence rather than executable closure or kernel truth.

notes: This batch preserves active A1 entropy support as a proposal-only controller fence set rather than lower-loop truth.
